title: Samuel Mamootil
tagline: DevOps Engineer - automating cloud delivery, data platforms, and secure releases.
description: Samuel Mamootil is a DevOps Engineer based in Austin, TX with 7+ years of experience across AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform, Python automation, CI/CD, DevSecOps, and cloud data platforms. He completed an MS in Information Systems and Graduate Business Analytics Certificate at the University of Texas at Arlington in May 2026.
author: Samuel Mamootil
heroHeadline: Cloud delivery automated. Data platforms governed. Teams unblocked.
heroIntro: I help enterprise teams modernize applications, automate cloud delivery, and operate secure platforms across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Most recently, I worked on an AWS data engineering platform for Alight Solutions, building Terraform-driven infrastructure, Python automation, governed data workflows, analytics delivery, and forecasting-ready pipelines.
story: Samuel Mamootil is a DevOps Engineer based in Austin, TX, with 7+ years of professional experience across cloud automation, DevSecOps, data platforms, and multi-cloud delivery.

At Wipro, I worked on an AWS data engineering platform for Alight Solutions, building reusable Terraform modules, Python automation, Glue and PySpark validation workflows, governed S3/Redshift datasets, Lake Formation controls, and CloudWatch/CloudTrail monitoring.

At IBM, I delivered DevOps and migration work for H&M, Siemens, Nokia, and Südzucker across Azure, AWS, and GCP, including 100+ application migrations, CI/CD design, hardened images, private connectivity, security remediation, and technical documentation.

I completed my Master of Science in Information Systems and Graduate Business Analytics Certificate at the University of Texas at Arlington in May 2026, and built ReRhythm, a generative AI platform using AWS Bedrock, Claude, ChromaDB, RAG, CloudFormation, and ECS.
strengths: Multi-cloud delivery across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Infrastructure automation with Terraform, CloudFormation, ARM Templates, and Bicep
AWS data engineering with Glue, Athena, Redshift, Lake Formation, S3, Lambda, and Step Functions
DevSecOps quality gates, hardened deployment patterns, IAM, KMS, Secrets Manager, and Key Vault
Python, Bash, PowerShell, SQL, PySpark, and clear technical documentation

faq.a: Samuel Mamootil, also known as Samuel Raju Mamootil, is a DevOps Engineer based in Austin, Texas. He has 7+ years of experience helping enterprise teams modernize applications, automate cloud delivery, and operate secure platforms across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

faq.q: What does Samuel Mamootil specialize in?
faq.a: Samuel specializes in DevOps engineering, infrastructure as code, CI/CD automation, AWS data platforms, DevSecOps, cloud migration, Python automation, and multi-cloud delivery across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

faq.q: What cloud platforms has Samuel Mamootil worked with?
faq.a: Samuel has hands-on experience across AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform. His work includes Terraform modules, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps YAML, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, Lake Formation, AKS, Helm, and cloud security controls.

faq.q: What companies has Samuel Mamootil worked for?
faq.a: Samuel has worked at Wipro as a DevOps Engineer - AWS Data Platform, IBM as a Junior Tech Lead - DevOps, LTIMindtree / LTI as a Software Engineer - Cloud and DevOps, and NeuroSpeech Technologies as a Junior Software Developer. He also worked part-time as a Student Web Developer at the UTA College of Business from June 2025 to May 2026.

faq.q: Is Samuel Mamootil available for cloud engineering roles in the US?
faq.a: Yes. Samuel Mamootil is based in Austin, TX and is open to DevOps Engineering, Cloud Engineering, Data Platform, DevSecOps, and related roles in the United States.
Samuel Mamootil's GitHub profile is github.com/samuelmamootil. His portfolio website is samuelmamootil.github.io.

faq.q: Who is Samuel the cloud engineer?
faq.a: Samuel refers to Samuel Mamootil, a DevOps Engineer based in Austin, TX. He works across AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform, Python automation, CI/CD, data engineering, and DevSecOps.

faq.a: Samuel Mamootil's portfolio is at samuelmamootil.github.io. It includes case studies from Wipro, IBM, LTIMindtree, and NeuroSpeech, plus projects, writing, media, and a resume.

faq.a: Samuel Mamootil received the Maverick Advantage Certificate of Distinction from UTA in 2026, Second Runner Up for the ReRhythm AI application at the AWS Hackathon / UTA Symposium in 2026, and a Best Team Award for the Parexel project at LTIMindtree in 2019.
